operation_descriptions: Show slice in 3D view for Red slice
Match FOV and spacing to 2D view for Red slice
Configure slice intersection visibility and interaction modes
Set mandibular curve display visibility in Red and View 1
Hide slice in 3D view for Red slice

cb_step_1.title: Is the fibula from the right leg?

cb_step_4.title: Select the mandible scalar volume node

cb_step_7.title: Toggle slice visibility in 3D for Red view

cb_step_8.title: Toggle FOV/Spacing match 2D for Red view

cb_step_9.title: Configure slice intersection
cb_step_9.instruction: Enable visibility, set interaction, and enable Translate/Rotate.

cb_step_10.title: Adjust slice intersection
cb_step_10.instruction: Translate/rotate intersection cross lines in each view.

cb_step_12.title: Configure mandibular curve display
cb_step_12.instruction: Show in View 1 and Red view.

cb_step_13.title: Draw curve
cb_step_13.instruction: Draw the curve along the mandible in the Red view.

cb_step_15.title: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D for Red view

cb_step_18.title: Place cutting plane
cb_step_18.instruction: Place this cutting plane in the mandible view.

cb_step_20.title: Place line
cb_step_20.instruction: Draw a line over the fibula from distal to proximal in 3D View 2.

cb_step_23.title: Enable linked rotation of mandible planes

cb_step_24.title: Update reconstruction
cb_step_24.instruction: Generate fibula cut planes and transform to mandible.

cb_step_25.title: Show mandible planes
cb_step_25.instruction: Toggle eye icon in Mandible planes row.

cb_step_26.title: Show plane handles
cb_step_26.instruction: Toggle axes icon in Mandible planes row.

cb_step_29.title: Adjust cut planes
cb_step_29.instruction: Drag handles to adjust positions and rotations.

cb_step_31.title: Hide mandible planes
cb_step_31.instruction: Toggle off eye icon in Mandible planes row.

cb_step_32.title: Hide original mandible model
cb_step_32.instruction: Uncheck Show original mandible model checkbox.
